title: Why the universe is too quiet
body:
The Fermi paradox remains one of the most haunting equations in modern astrophysics. If life is an inevitable statistical cosmic byproduct, the interstellar canvas shouldn't feel this empty...lkdm2ldm323d

title: The strange math behind black hole information
body: Hawking radiation suggested information gets completely pulverized inside singularities. Yet modern quantum mechanics strongly resists information decay...

title: Light has no experience of time
body: From the frame of reference of a traveling photon, creation and absorption happen simultaneously. Time stands perfectly still at $c$.
